message:
feat(freeze): add bytecode-based dispatch for proper closure var_refs access

Add a bytecode-based dispatch path to complement the existing name-based dispatch.
The bytecode dispatch extracts var_refs from the actual function object in
JS_CallInternal, ensuring frozen functions receive proper closure variable
references for closure access.

Changes:
- Add bytecode registry to native_dispatch.zig for mapping bytecode pointers
  to frozen functions
- Update QuickJS patch to extract var_refs from function object and call
  bytecode dispatch before name-based dispatch
- Rename frozen_dispatch_stub.c to frozen_dispatch_cli.c with updated
  function signatures for var_refs parameter
- Fix hash function to work on both 32-bit (wasm32) and 64-bit platforms

The closure access now works correctly for frozen functions that capture
variables from enclosing scopes. Tested with simple closure test case
returning correct value (42) from captured variable.
